## Summary

What does this PR change?

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New app profile
- [ ] Workflow update
- [ ] Engine change
- [ ] Documentation

## Profile checklist

- [ ] Profile frontmatter is complete
- [ ] At least two workflows are included
- [ ] Workflows follow `VAULT_SPEC.md`
- [ ] Routes are ordered cheapest first
- [ ] Verification is defined where possible
- [ ] Tested on a real install

## Tests

Paste test output:

```text
python -m pytest tests/ -v
```
